violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wood shelf above the three compartment sink is bare wood. Wood supports for the counter for the rice cookers by the soda dispenser are bare wood. Pallet under the chest freezer by the hand sink is bare wood. These must be painted, or sealed.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. Several containers in the walk in cooler used for food storage were black. Food contact surfaces must be light colored.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system over the stove needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls, ceilings, and lights in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Lighting. — --Light intensity for areas of handwash, warewash, equipment/utensil storage, food offering or toilet room * was insufficient. The lights in the dish area are not working and the light provided is insufficient to show the accumulation of dirt and debris.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
